name: U.S. Coins and Jewelry
description_short: Houston-based buyer and seller of rare coins, bullion, jewelry, watches, and collectible memorabilia with in-person appraisals and estate settlement services.
description_long:
U.S. Coins and Jewelry operates as a physical pawn shop and collectibles dealer based in Houston, Texas, located at 8435 Katy Freeway. The business functions as both a retail buyer and seller, specializing in numismatic items, precious metals, and high-value collectibles rather than traditional pawn lending. The company maintains live precious metals pricing on their website (gold, silver, platinum) and actively purchases items from customers while maintaining an inventory for resale.

The company offers a comprehensive range of services centered on buying and selling collectible assets. These include rare coin acquisition and sales across multiple categories (gold coins, silver dollars, copper pennies, world coins), bullion trading (gold, silver, platinum, palladium), luxury watch sales through a partnership with Duncan Watch Company, sports memorabilia and cards, vintage comic books, military medals and documents, historical paper money, and jewelry and diamonds. They explicitly advertise free evaluations and appraisals for coins, diamonds, and gemstones, plus custom jewelry creation and estate settlement services for both individual clients and attorneys.

U.S. Coins and Jewelry distinguishes itself through specialization in high-value, authenticated collectibles rather than general pawn merchandise. They maintain expertise in numismatic grading and authentication, offer estate settlement services (including attorney partnerships), provide diamond and gemstone analysis, and curate curated inventory across multiple collectible categories. The business also operates an auction platform and publishes educational content (blog, podcast) related to coin collecting and investment.

The primary limitation is that this is a specialized collectibles buyer, not a traditional pawn shop offering short-term collateral loans or emergency cash advances. Customers seeking quick liquidity for general household items or those needing traditional pawn loans should look elsewhere. The business requires items of genuine collectible or precious metal value, and transactions depend on current market prices and item authentication—making this suitable only for those with qualifying inventory to sell.

pricing.guarantee_details: Contact provider for current pricing and guarantee details.

pros: Live precious metals pricing displayed on website (gold, silver, platinum with real-time updates)
Free evaluations and appraisals for coins, diamonds, and gemstones with no obligation to sell
Multi-category expertise spanning rare coins, bullion, jewelry, watches, memorabilia, and paper money
Estate settlement services including specific attorney partnership offerings for probate situations
Diamond and gemstone analysis services beyond basic valuation
Dual buy/sell model allows customers to both liquidate items and purchase authenticated inventory
Educational resources including blog and podcast content on coin collecting and investment
cons: Not a traditional pawn lender—does not offer collateral-based loans or emergency cash advances despite pawn shop categorization
Limited to high-value collectibles; general household items, electronics, and non-collectible goods not accepted
Single physical location (Houston, TX) limits accessibility for customers outside the area
Transaction values and timelines depend entirely on item authentication and current market prices, not guaranteed
No transparent pricing information available online—valuations require direct contact or in-person evaluation
best_for: Estate executors and attorneys settling deceased persons' collectible assets and jewelry
Coin and bullion collectors seeking to liquidate or purchase authenticated rare items
Jewelry owners with diamonds, gemstones, or precious metal pieces to appraise or sell
Collectors of sports memorabilia, vintage comics, and historical documents seeking specialized buyers
diagnosis: U.S. Coins and Jewelry is best for collectors, estate executors, and individuals with authenticated collectible assets (coins, bullion, jewelry, memorabilia) seeking knowledgeable local buyers with market-rate valuations. The critical caveat is that this is not a traditional pawn shop offering emergency loans or cash advances—it is exclusively a buy/sell dealership requiring items of genuine collectible or precious metal value.
services: Buy and sell rare coins (gold, silver, copper, clad, world coins)
Precious metals bullion trading (gold, silver, platinum, palladium)
Sports memorabilia and sports cards buying and selling
Vintage comic book sales (Marvel, DC Comics, other publishers)
Military medals, militaria, and historical documents trading
U.S. and historical paper money buying and selling
Jewelry and diamonds sales with certification verification
Free coin, diamond, and gemstone appraisals and evaluations
Estate settlement services for individuals and attorneys
typical_results_timeline: Results vary by individual situation. Contact the provider to discuss expected timelines for your specific needs.
